Our Menu

The Full TOPS Menu

Hand-tossed pizzas, 31 wing flavours, Greek classics, pub favourites — 51 years of family recipes.

🍕 Pizzas

Hand-tossed pizzas made fresh daily from a family recipe rolled out since 1975. Real Alberta mozzarella, in-ho...

🍗 Appetizers

Wings (31 flavours), Greek mezedes, boneless dry ribs, steak bites, nachos supreme, bread stix. The TOPS lineu...

🥗 Soups & Salads

Fresh salads and house-made soups. Greek salad, Caesar, garden, and rotating soup options.

🍔 Burgers & Sandwiches

Hand-formed burgers, classic sandwiches, donairs. Cooked the way pub food should be.

🍝 Pastas

Comfort-food pastas — spaghetti and meatballs, lasagna, fettuccine alfredo, classic Greek pasta options.

🇬🇷 TOPS Classics

The dishes that built TOPS — Greek souvlaki, gyro plates, classic pub dinners.

🧁 Desserts

House-made and classic desserts to finish the meal right.

Order

Call to order, walk in, or delivery via Skip / Uber / DoorDash. (403) 275-2722

Where cold beer meets hot pizza — and the game’s always on.
